title: Custom Mace Textures
description: This Texture Pack changes the texture of the mace based on its name.
body:
This Texture Pack changes the texture of the mace based on its name.
Many names are based on the maces from many players from the Unstable smp like Gambit (Wemmbu primary mace), Crucible (Wemmbu secondary mace), Incinerator (FlameFrags mace), Knightfall (MinuteTech mace), Executioner (LettuceK mace) and more!

Gambit ![Gambit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e536f3457cb218af230d3d2d0ccb386c8720087.png)

Crucible ![Crucible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f0c72313a0e0360e5b58cf5f7ca91e7f58c8db9.png)

Incinerator ![Incinerator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b825522162bdaf77cfc6f1765962b3f8ef0dc7a6.png)

Knightfall ![Knightfall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf8e3d48a4907ff2234f39bef647fa0bfee1cc17.png)

Executioner ![Executioner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a3b1a3f20323fb6d8f2f7b120144479eb108d6e.png)
